title: Acquisition of tangible and intangible assets held by Versarien Plc by the prospective UK Joint Venture Co and Anhui Boundary Innovative Materials Technology Co Ltd: notice of final order
body: "The Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster has made a final order under the National Security and Investment Act 2021 in respect of the acquisition of tangible and intangible assets held by Versarien Plc by the prospective UK Joint Venture Co and Anhui Boundary Innovative Materials Technology Co Ltd. "
